hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select organisation_id, organisation_name, organisation_type, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'ORGANISATION_TYPES' and lookup_code = organisation_type) as organisation_type_meaning, relationship, abn, acn, state, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'STATES' and lookup_code = state) as state_meaning, country, decode( address_line||', '||suburb||', '||(select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'STATES' and lookup_code = state)||', '||post_code||', '||country, ', , , , ', '', address_line||', '||suburb||', '||(select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'STATES' and lookup_code = state)||', '||post_code||', '||country ) as address, to_char(first_contact_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') as first_contact_date, es_payroll_consultant as csc, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_payroll_consultant) as csc_name, es_account_manager as cdm_crm, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_account_manager) as cdm_crm_name, es_cs_consultant as cdm_csm, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_cs_consultant) as cdm_csm_name, es_bd_manager as cad_csd, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_bd_manager) as cad_csd_name, es_customer_administrator as csa, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_customer_administrator) as csa_name, es_migration_consultant as migration_consultant, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_migration_consultant) as migration_consultant_name, es_migration_administrator as migration_administrator, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = es_migration_administrator) as migration_administrator_name, customer_category, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'ORGANISATION_TYPES' and lookup_code = customer_category) as customer_category_meaning, customer_stream, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'CUSTOMER_STREAM' and lookup_code = customer_stream) as customer_stream_meaning, tax_invoice_acceptance_type, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'TAX_INVOICE_ACCEPTANCE_TYPE' and lookup_code = tax_invoice_acceptance_type) as tax_invoice_acceptance_meaning from hp_organisation_d where 1 = 1 ${auto_fill} ${where_clause} ${order_by_clause}
